rationale: Acting on Review 1's findings on squareClass_of_sq_mem_fintype (derived via padding+attachFin from the ℕ version) and sqrtTower (ℕ→L + Iio truncation) would produce a materially more general PR by proving the ι+[Finite] case first then specializing; Review 2's approve leaves the backwards derivation and less-general abstractions unchanged. The Quadratic existential and NeZero position are secondary but real API improvements grounded directly in the diff.
